channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Systems Engineering Review with RPI at Work on June 24
item.description: Date: Wednesday, June 24, 2026 12:00 PM - 12:30 PM - This 30-minute information session hosted by Dean Aric Krause, Ph.D., will focus on RPI’s Systems Engineering and Technology Management graduate degree. The degree is digitally delivered, flexible, and project-based to prepare decision-makers with broader and deeper capabilities in leading dynamic organizations. The session will highlight program details and how you can select graduate certificates relevant to your work to complete your…
item.author: Community

item.title: Changes for Submitting a LMS Summer 2026 Course Requests
item.description: Instructors - Please read the entire announcement, as there are changes in submitting a LMS request due to moving to Ultra Course View. You can find Ultra Videos and documentation on our LMS support site.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Fidelity Confidential Consultation (In Person)
item.description:
Date: Thursday, June 25, 2026 8:00 AM - 4:30 PM - Schedule a confidential consultation to help you become better informed and more confident about your workplace retirement savings plan benefits. To schedule an appointment, call 1-800-642-7131, Monday through Friday, 8:00 am to midnight, or online at https://nb.fidelity.com/public/nbpreloginnav/rpi/microsite/#/tem/meet-with-us

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
